comments.author: @EpicEarthYTB
comments.text:
🌍 St. Helena is one of the most isolated inhabited islands on Earth… but after watching this documentary, did it feel like a prison or a paradise to you?
⭐ Give this journey a rating from 0–10 in the comments. We’d truly love to hear your thoughts.
📍 And where are you watching from today? Let us know below so we can see how far this community reaches across the world.
❤ If you enjoy cinematic travel documentaries about hidden places, forgotten histories, and extraordinary cultures, don’t forget to subscribe and share this video with someone who loves exploring our planet.
Your support helps Earth Revealed continue discovering the world’s most fascinating places, one story at a time.

comments.author: @owenthornhill9671
comments.text: AI commentary it says street Helena not saint Helena

replies.author: @jeremyb5640
replies.text:
@EpicEarthYTB Can you not record the commentary in your own natural speaking voice, rather than relying on AI? People would much rather hear a natural human voice.

And how much of the footage is original footage of St. Helena and how much pulled from other people's videos? How much of the footage is from other islands, other places?

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you for the correction! 🙏 AI voiceovers can sometimes struggle with abbreviations like 'St.' for Saint. I appreciate your feedback and will work on better accuracy. Please stay tuned and keep supporting the channel for more! 🚀🎞

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: Thank you so much! ❤ Welcome to the channel! St. Helena is truly a hidden gem, and I'm so glad you enjoyed the journey. Stay tuned for more adventures! 😊👋✨
